scenarios.description: parse(String html, String baseUri) returns Document when html non-empty and baseUri non-empty
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document has html() equal to input html wrapped in <html><head></head><body>…</body></html> and base URI set to provided baseUri
pseudocode: TEST TC01_O1 parse html with baseUri

scenarios.description: parse(String html) uses empty baseUri and returns Document with body fragment
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document body html equals input html and base URI is empty string
pseudocode: TEST TC02_O1 parse html with default baseUri

scenarios.description: parse(String html, String baseUri, Parser parser) invokes parser.parseInput when parser non-null
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document from parser.parseInput with correct body HTML and baseUri
pseudocode: TEST TC03_O2 parse with custom parser

scenarios.description: parse(String html, Parser parser) invokes parser.parseInput with empty baseUri
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document from parser.parseInput has empty baseUri and correct body HTML
pseudocode: TEST TC04_O3 parse body with parser only

scenarios.description: parse(File file, String charsetName, String baseUri) loads file when file exists and charset valid
scenarios.precondition:
temporary file with content "

File

" on filesystem
scenarios.expectedResult:
returned Document body html equals "

File

" and baseUri equals provided baseUri
pseudocode: TEST TC05_O4 parse file with explicit charset and baseUri

scenarios.description: parse(File file, String charsetName) loads file defaulting baseUri to file absolute path
scenarios.precondition:
temporary file with content "

Local

" on filesystem
scenarios.expectedResult:
returned Document body html equals "

Local

" and baseUri equals file.getAbsolutePath()
pseudocode: TEST TC06_O4 parse file with charset only

scenarios.description: parse(File file) loads file defaulting charset null and baseUri to file absolute path
scenarios.precondition:
temporary file with content "

Auto

" on filesystem
scenarios.expectedResult:
returned Document body html equals "

Auto

" and baseUri equals file.getAbsolutePath()
pseudocode: TEST TC07_O4 parse file with defaults

scenarios.description: parse(URL url,int timeoutMillis) throws MalformedURLException when URL protocol non-http
pseudocode: TEST TC08_O5 parse URL invalid protocol

scenarios.description: parse(URL url,int timeoutMillis) throws SocketTimeoutException when connection times out
scenarios.precondition: live HTTP URL that delays beyond timeout; mocking necessary: stub Connection.get() to throw java.net.SocketTimeoutException
pseudocode: TEST TC09_O5 parse URL with timeout

scenarios.description: parse(InputStream in,String charsetName,String baseUri) throws IOException on null stream
parseBodyFragment(String bodyHtml,String baseUri) returns Document fragment under empty baseUri branch
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document body html equals input fragment and baseUri equals empty string
